items.name: ZiP_Chain ✨
items.description: Make a bold and modern statement with the Zip Chain Necklace, a unique layered piece designed to stand out. Featuring two stylish chains — one in a sleek silver tone and the other in a warm gold finish — this necklace creates a trendy mixed-metal look that elevates any outfit. The centerpiece showcases the word “ZIP” in a clean, contemporary design, symbolizing speed, confidence, and urban style.

items.name: Cute Idol Anarchy Angel Dress Skirt | Fantasy R15
items.description:
STRICTLY  WORKS FOR R15, IF YOUR CHARACTER IS R15 PLEASE BUY THIS R15 VERSION!! 
[FITTED FOR WOMAN : https://www.roblox.com/bundles/239/Woman]
MATCHING TOP: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/116783862393781/Cute-Idol-Anarchy-Angel-Dress-Top-Fantasy-R15
MATCHING WINGS:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/122460934751691/Cute-Idol-Anarchy-Angel-Wings-White-Feather

A stunning white and gold transformation dress skirt inspired by a glamorous, attitude-filled angel from the classic PSG anime. This celestial-themed outfit features layered frills, metallic gold trims, and a magical girl silhouette perfect for concerts, cosplay, or divine entrances.

R6 VERSION

items.name: LV Trunkie Bag
items.description:
This shoulder bag is crafted of LV coated canvas with black leather trim. It features gold rivets, a half leather threaded chain-link shoulder strap, and metal corners. The flap has an S-lock clasp closure that opens to a black microfiber interior with a zipper pocket.
